title: Trade Finance Executive
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

Headquartered in Singapore, Agrocorp International is a leading integrated agricultural commodity and food solutions provider with presence in 16 countries and 25 offices. For over 30 years, Agrocorp has played a distinct role in nourishing the changing world with our agri-food supplies and solutions. To better serve our vision of nourishing a changing world, we’ve grown in size and business verticals from farm partnerships to processing plants and to retail market distribution. Our product range has widened to include a wide variety of commodities & food ingredients. In retail space, Sansar foods offers a wide range of premium pulses and HerbYvore is our plant based food range which includes non diary cheese, eggless egg, vegan ice cream etc.

Job Summary

The Trade Finance Executive is responsible for managing and processing trade finance transactions related to import and export operations. The role ensures compliance with international trade regulations, bank policies, and documentary credit rules while providing efficient support to clients and internal stakeholders.

Responsibilities

  • Manage end-to-end processing of trade finance documents including issuance, advising, amendment, and settlement of Letters of Credit (LCs)
  • Execute Documentary Collections for import and export transactions, ensuring timely payment to suppliers
  • Process Bank Guarantees and Standby Letters of Credit accurately and within required timelines
  • Track and monitor LC issuances, confirmations, discounting, expiry dates, and negotiate related terms to mitigate risks
  • Apply for loans under trade transactions and follow up to secure necessary approvals and disbursements
  • Monitor trade transactions for due dates and discrepancies, proactively initiating follow-ups to resolve issues
  • Provide internal guidance and support on trade finance transactions to resolve operational challenges and ensure smooth processing
  • Coordinate effectively with banks, clients, shipping companies, and internal departments to facilitate seamless trade operations
  • Maintain and update accurate records and Management Information System (MIS) reports for daily reporting to management
  • Support back-office functions by performing timely data entry and assisting team members during absences
  • Collaborate closely with Trade Finance team members and cross-functional teams to deliver unified support and achieve operational goals

Skills & Competencies

  • Demonstrate strong knowledge of trade finance products and apply ICC rules (UCP 600, URC 522, ISP98) to ensure compliance and accuracy
  • Apply excellent attention to detail and analytical skills to identify and resolve discrepancies in trade documents
  • Communicate clearly and coordinate efficiently with multiple stakeholders to drive transaction completion
  • Manage multiple trade finance transactions under tight deadlines while maintaining accuracy and compliance
  • Utilize MS Office and trade finance systems proficiently to support transaction processing and reporting
  • Maintain a compliance-oriented mindset to uphold regulatory and bank policy standards
